passives.desc:
Upon hitting 80%, 60%, and 40% HP, no longer take damage and gain a new pattern
Upon gaining a new pattern, recover from Stagger and raise Speed to 10 next turn
passives.name: The Enthralling Tales, the Beating Passion

passives.desc:
Encounter Start: gain [Dreamy].
Encounter Start: the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will surface, increasing [BloodDinner] by 400.
passives.name: In Dreams

passives.desc:
Turn End: If Panicked, recover from Panic, and consume 100 [BloodDinner] to gain 3 [Enhancement]
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 30 [Laceration], 3 [Enhancement], and 2 Damage Up
passives.name: But I have my Father and my Family whom I cannot abandon

passives.desc:
On Hit, if the target has [Laceration], heal Part and Core by 40% of the damage dealt.
- This Passive heals +1% more HP for every [Laceration] Potency on self (max 20%)
- For Unbreakable Coins: this effect does not activate on Hit After Clash Lose.
Every Turn Start: heal ([BloodDinner]/10) HP. (max 50)
Every Turn Start: at -15 or less SP, consume (20 - current SP) [BloodDinner] to gain SP and gain 2 Clash Power Up
On Kill, gain 5 [BloodArmor]
passives.name: If we can be freed from this excruciating sickness

passives.desc: Turn End: Min & Max Speed +1 next turn for every 300 [BloodDinner]
passives.name: Can I go on an adventure, too?

passives.desc:
If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase [BloodDinner] value by the amount of [Laceration] damage collectively received by every unit. 
When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will fill the surface.
passives.name: Bloodfeast

passives.desc:
Combat Start: gain 1 [BloodArmor]
- [BloodArmor] cannot drop below 1
- At 10+ [BloodArmor], convert them to [BloodArmor_2nd].
- At 20+ [BloodArmor], convert them to [BloodArmor_3rd].
Gain Min & Max Speed based on the Stage of this effect (max 2)
If this unit consumes [BloodArmor] and drops below the above thresholds, revert to previous Stages accordingly
passives.name: Hardblood

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume 10 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [BloodArmor]
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 [BloodArmor] (max 2)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 15 [Laceration] on self (max 3)
skills.name: Topple

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume up to 20 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [BloodArmor] for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 [BloodArmor] (max 2)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 15 [Laceration] on self (max 3)
skills.name: Wound

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Deal +10% damage for every [Laceration] on the target (max 100%)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume 4 [BloodArmor] to heal 10 SP
[WhenUse] Consume 10 [BloodDinner] to gain 1 [BloodArmor] and heal 10 SP
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 3 [Laceration].
skills.name: Sanguine Joy

skills.desc:
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed
[StartBattle] If there are enemies with [Laceration], activate [Laceration] on all enemies. All enemies lose 2 [Laceration] Count
[WhenUse] If this effect did not activate at Combat Start, gain 30 [Laceration].
[WinDuel] Consume up to 40 [BloodDinner]: for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed, gain 1 [BloodArmor] and deal +25% damage (max 100%)
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 5 [Laceration], and activate [Laceration] immediately. Lose 2 [Laceration] Count
[EndSkill] Ends this turn
skills.name: Ecstasy of Blood

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Laceration], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] With this Skill, deal +20% damage with every Stage of [BloodArmor] (max 60%)
[DefeatDuel] Consume 4 [BloodArmor] to gain 20 Shield HP
skills.name: Don Quixote Hardblood Arts 4 - Sundering

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Activate [Laceration] on the target equal to its Count. Use up the target's [Laceration] Count down to 1

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 3 [Laceration] on the target (max 3)
[WinDuel] With this Skill, deal +20% damage with every Stage of [BloodArmor] (max 60%)
[DefeatDuel] Consume 4 [BloodArmor] to gain 20 Shield HP
skills.name: Don Quixote Hardblood Arts 11 - Impaling

skills.desc:
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed
[StartBattle] Consume 200 [BloodDinner], gain 500 Shield HP, 5 [BloodArmor], and 1 [SwirlingBlood]
- If this unit doesn't have enough [BloodDinner], gain 50 [Laceration], and activate [Laceration] immediately. Lose 2 [Laceration] Count. Gain 500 Shield HP and 1 [SwirlingBlood] (this damage does not reduce this unit's HP to 1)
[WinDuel] Gain 200 Shield HP
[DefeatDuel] Gain 3 [Vulnerable] as long as the Shield gained due to this Skill is active
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% damage, and the damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
[EndSkill] Ends this turn
skills.name: Don Quixote Hardblood Arts 2 - Hardblood

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Binding] next turn
- If this Skill consumed 30 [BloodDinner], inflict 2 additional [Binding]

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the most [Laceration]
[BeforeAttack] If the target is the one with the most [Laceration], gain Atk Weight +2 and Clash Power +3
[WhenUse] Consume up to 30 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [BloodArmor] and Coin Power +1 for every 15 [BloodDinner] consumed (max 2)
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 10 [Laceration], and activate [Laceration] immediately. Lose 2 [Laceration] Count
[EndSkill] Increase [BloodDinner] equal to the damage this Skill dealt
skills.name: Variant Don Quixote Style: Sancho Arts 4 - Track

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Paralysis] next turn
- If this Skill consumed 50 [BloodDinner], inflict 2 additional [Paralysis]

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the most [Laceration]
[BeforeAttack] If the target is the one with the most [Laceration], gain Atk Weight +2 and Clash Power +3
[WhenUse] Consume up to 50 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [BloodArmor] and Base Power +1 for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed (max 5)
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 10 [Laceration], and activate [Laceration] immediately. Lose 1 [Laceration] Count
[EndSkill] Increase [BloodDinner] equal to the damage this Skill dealt
skills.name: Variant Don Quixote Style: Sancho Arts 3 - Ambush

skills.desc:
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed
[WhenUse] Consume 50 [BloodDinner] to inflict 1 [Paralysis] against the target and self
[WhenUse] Consume 100 [BloodDinner] to gain Clash Power +5
- If there isn't enough [BloodDinner], consume 100 HP from this unit to gain Clash Power +5
[EndSkill] Ends this turn
skills.name: Variant Don Quixote Style: Sancho Arts 2 - La Sangre

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Deal +10% damage for every [Laceration] on the target (max 200%)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume (45 - current SP) [BloodDinner] to heal up to 45 SP
- If there isn't enough [BloodDinner], consume up to (45 - current SP) HP to heal up to 45 SP (this damage does not lower this unit's HP below 1)
- Gain Shield HP equal to the remaining [BloodDinner] (max 100)
[WinDuel] Inflict 10 [Laceration]
[DefeatDuel] Consume 100 [BloodDinner]
[EndSkill] Increase [BloodDinner] equal to the damage dealt
skills.name: La Aventura Ha Terminado
